description_long: This is a modern, boxy chaise with a deep seat and high, straight backrest and armrests, all upholstered in a dark, likely charcoal gray fabric. The seat and backrest feature subtle tufting with two buttons on the backrest, adding a touch of visual interest to the otherwise minimalist design. The armrests are thick and run parallel to the seat, providing ample support on both sides. The base is slightly recessed and appears to be constructed from a darker, possibly wooden or metal material, giving the chaise a floating appearance. The overall silhouette is geometric and robust, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, parks, or waiting areas. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with a soft, cushioned surface for comfortable seating.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with dark gray tufted upholstery, high straight armrests, and a recessed base, offering a minimalist and comfortable seating option.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep seat, high backrest with two tufted buttons, and thick armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the solid, straight armrest and the depth of the seat, with the tufted backrest partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, straight backrest and the recessed base, with both armrests visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and the seat depth, with the tufted backrest slightly visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, straight, and rectangular with two subtle tufted buttons, giving it a slightly cushioned and tailored appearance. It is visually integrated with the armrests, forming a continuous, boxy enclosure.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, thick, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, forming a unified, boxy frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are not distinctly visible, but the base appears slightly recessed and likely constructed from a dark wood or metal, giving the chaise a floating effect with a minimalist finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark gray with a smooth, matte finish and features subtle tufting with two buttons on the backrest, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise plain surface.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large seat cushion integrated into the base and a single backrest cushion with two tufted buttons; both are attached and form a continuous, plush seating area without any loose or layered cushions.
